pass_criteria: Installed speaking length is within 380-420 mm and nominal target is documented
No active CAD/BOM/design table uses the archived long-scale value as erhu geometry
Both strings produce repeatable bowed response with membrane installed
At least two bridge variants are measured and compared
evidence_to_record: Bridge height mass photo and response notes

pass_criteria: String gauges or product IDs are recorded
Player can stop/pull strings through usable pitch range without unsafe action
Generated images are labeled concept only and DXF/CAD/measurements remain authority
Membrane/string/body materials are legal ethical stable and suitable for the shop environment
evidence_to_record: Material source notes humidity notes and failure observations

pass_criteria: MCP/tool provenance log exists and names authority limits for CAD DXF visuals and analysis
Computational notes are source-only unless a Wolfram run log and outputs are committed
